title: Auto-slicing AssetPostprocessor -> LpcLayerSet
description: OnPreprocessTexture: any texture under Catalog/ -> Sprite/Multiple, 9x4=36 frame grid, PPU 32, feet pivot. OnPostprocessAllAssets: generate/update the matching LpcLayerSet.asset (slot from folder, zOrder from slot->z table, frames from sliced sprites).

title: Migrate runtime scripts from Ultima4_2d into the package
description: Move LpcCharacter, LpcLayerSet, LpcRecipe, LpcCharacterBuilder, LpcCharacterSpawner (.cs + .meta, preserving GUIDs so existing .asset refs survive) into Runtime/ under namespace Lpc. Decouple the animator from PartyController (expose Facing/Walking fields the game sets). Update Ultima4 usings; verify compile + that StarterRecipe/LpcLayerSet assets still resolve.
close_reason: Migrated 6 runtime scripts into the package (namespace Lpc, GUIDs preserved); decoupled animator from PartyController via new ILpcMotion interface. Validated in Ultima4_2d: 0 compile errors, 9/9 SO assets intact, 0 missing scripts, play mode builds 6 layers + animator auto-wires via ILpcMotion.

title: Catalog manifest + selective copy script
description: catalog_manifest.json (slots x options, walk-only) + a copy step that pulls only those walk.png files from the local LPC clone into a Catalog/<slot>/<option>.png layout. Volume control so Unity never chokes.

title: LPC importer + runtime in the package
description: Move the layered LPC character runtime out of the Ultima4_2d game into this reusable package, and build the selective importer (manifest + copy + auto-slicing AssetPostprocessor), palette recolor, and an editor window that points at a local LPC clone. Art stays user-supplied (CC-BY-SA); importer emits attribution.

title: Palette recolor (runtime palette-swap)
description: Read LPC palette_definitions ramps; luminance-order the base 6-shade ramp and remap to a target color ramp at runtime, so style (layer) x color (recolor) is N+M not NxM. Already prototyped for hair in the game; generalize here.

title: Editor window: point at LPC repo, browse + pick layers
description: A window with the LPC clone path setting, a browser of available slots/options, and checkboxes that write into catalog_manifest.json + run the copy. WoW-style preview optional.

title: OpenGameArt scraping for missing LPC assets
description: Later: scrape opengameart.org for LPC-compatible layers not present in the base generator clone. Respect licenses + attribution.
